name: GSAT-1
description: GSAT-1 was an Indian communications satellite launched by GSLV Mk-1. It was intended to provide communications services but experienced technical issues.

name: Chandrayaan-1
description: Chandrayaan-1 was India's first lunar probe. It was launched by the Indian Space Research Organisation in October 2008 and operated until August 2009.

name: Mars Orbiter Mission
description: The Mars Orbiter Mission (MOM), also called Mangalyaan, was India's first interplanetary mission. It was launched by PSLV-XL C25 and successfully entered Mars orbit in September 2014.
